hook.name: PerpetualHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for the PerpetualMeme token launchpad that applies a time-decaying buy fee (starting at 95%, decaying to a 10% floor over blocks) and a fixed 10% sell fee. Fees are collected via afterSwapReturnsDelta, with 80% deposited to the PerpetualMeme contract and 20% sent to a protocol fee address. Pool initialization and liquidity additions are restricted to the PerpetualFactory.
